stimulus: What makes the kalimba a unique instrument? You play it by plucking metal tines with your thumbs. When you press your ______blank the pitch will change as the tine vibrates.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice D is correct. The plural noun “thumbs” and the plural noun “tines” correctly indicate that two thumbs are pressed against multiple metal tines.

Choices A, B, and C all incorrectly add possessive apostrophes to one or both nouns when no possession is needed.
